subcodes.first_line: O thou who art near unto the Court of the All-Glorious! Once again have I taken up my pen to write this letter, remembering that steadfast friend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقرب درگاه کبریاء باز بتحریر این نامه مسطور پرداختم و بیاد ان یار وقور
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
